title: Custom payment application
excerpt: Learn how to customize the way payments are recorded and applied using the Stripe Connector for NetSuite. To learn more and get a demo of the Stripe Connector for NetSuite, go to the [Stripe App Marketplace](https://marketplace.stripe.com/apps/netsuite-connector) and click **Install app**. The Stripe Connector for NetSuite provides a way for you to reconcile Stripe payment activity from your custom or prebuilt, third-party integration to NetSuite.…
